name: Angel Wing
description:
Angel Wing is known to be a very sweet and caring person, she is also very empathetic towards anyone.. especially even with the contestants who aren't the most empathetic... But she means well, and cares about the ones that are nice.. or if they aren't nice to her.. she'll get very upset....

And Angel Wing loves to give people compliments!

And the team that she is on is...Papaya!!!
creator: Leighia777
